pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or comply with the migration goal.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.source to 21 to ensure source code is parsed as Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may reject Java 21 syntax or fail to enforce Java 21 source compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.target to 21 to ensure bytecode is generated for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode will be incompatible with Java 21 runtime expectations or will not leverage Java 21 optimizations.
